text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Upper Galilee region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部上加利利地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 So... Pete Hegseth uses a fake Bible verse from "Pulp Fiction" for a prayer during a Pentagon meeting. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 所以……皮特·海格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）在五角大楼的一次会议上，竟然引用了电影《低俗小说》中的伪造圣经经文来进行祈祷。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Pete Hegseth quoted a fake Bible verse from Pulp Fiction during a Pentagon sermon.
text_zh: 皮特·海格塞斯在五角大楼的布道中引用了《低俗小说》里的伪造圣经经文。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 Heavy Israeli airstrikes targeted the industrial zone in Nabatieh city, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Footage showcasing the moment Israeli airstrikes targeted Nabatieh city, aswell as a image showcasing Israeli airstrikes targeting Kfar Hatta located in Sidons countryside. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧 以色列对黎巴嫩南部纳巴泰市的工业区进行了猛烈空袭。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 视频展示了以色列空袭纳巴泰市的瞬间，以及一张展示以色列空袭西顿乡村地区卡法哈塔（Kfar Hatta）的照片。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇸🇾🇸🇾💲 The Syrian dollar hit a 13,700 L.S per dollar exchange rate. The average Syrian to Dollar exchange rate during the rule of the former Syrian Government under sanctions was 14,000 L.S @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇸🇾 The head of the Damascus Lawyers Association branch, Muhammad Suleiman Dahla, describes those who will participate in the April 17th protests as "remnants". (As in former regime supporters) The demonstration is against high living expenses and the lack of safety across Syria. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇸🇾🇸🇾💲 叙利亚镑对美元汇率跌至1美元兑13,700叙利亚镑。在前叙利亚政府受制裁期间，叙利亚镑对美元的平均汇率曾达到14,000叙利亚镑。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇸🇾 大马士革律师协会分会负责人穆罕默德·苏莱曼·达拉（Muhammad Suleiman Dahla）将参加4月17日抗议活动的人称为“残余势力”（指前政权支持者）。此次示威活动旨在抗议叙利亚各地的高昂生活成本和安全匮乏问题。 @wfwitness

text: Türkiye will host talks this week on regional security cooperation with Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, and possibly Egypt. The meeting, involving foreign ministers including Hakan Fidan, will take place during the Antalya Diplomacy Forum. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 土耳其本周将与巴基斯坦、沙特阿拉伯以及可能的埃及举行关于区域安全合作的会谈。此次会议将在安塔利亚外交论坛期间举行，包括哈坎·菲丹（Hakan Fidan）在内的外交部长将出席。来源：彭博社

text: 🇪🇸 🇻🇪 Spanish energy group Repsol said on Thursday it has reached an agreement with the Venezuelan government to regain control of its oil business in the country and sharply increase production over the coming years.
text_zh: 🇪🇸 🇻🇪 西班牙能源集团雷普索尔（Repsol）周四表示，已与委内瑞拉政府达成协议，将重新获得其在该国石油业务的控制权，并计划在未来几年大幅提高产量。

text: Britain may face food shortages this summer if the Iran war continues. Officials warn that disruption in the Strait of Hormuz could reduce carbon dioxide (CO₂) supplies, which are essential for food production, packaging, and drink manufacturing. This could lead to shortages of items like chicken, pork, and fizzy drinks, though not a complete lack of food—mainly reduced variety in shops. Source: The Times
text_zh: 如果伊朗战争持续，英国今年夏天可能会面临食品短缺。官员警告称，霍尔木兹海峡的混乱可能会减少二氧化碳（CO₂）的供应，而二氧化碳对于食品生产、包装和饮料制造至关重要。这可能导致鸡肉、猪肉和碳酸饮料等商品短缺，虽然不至于完全断供，但商店里的商品种类将大幅减少。来源：《泰晤士报》

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Pentagon have held preliminary talks with major U.S. manufacturers like General Motors, Ford Motor, GE Aerospace, and Oshkosh Corporation to shift some commercial production toward munitions, missiles, military vehicles, and other defense supplies. Translation: The Pentagon is so low on munitions after messing with Iran that they’re now begging Ford and GM to turn their car factories into missile plants.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 五角大楼已与通用汽车、福特汽车、通用电气航空和奥什科什公司（Oshkosh Corporation）等美国主要制造商进行了初步会谈，旨在将部分商业生产转向弹药、导弹、军用车辆和其他国防物资。解读：五角大楼在与伊朗发生冲突后弹药储备严重不足，现在正恳求福特和通用汽车将汽车工厂改造成导弹工厂。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 IDF said that Hezbollah fired a ballistic missile from Lebanon at the southern Haifa Bay area overnight. No sirens sounded in any towns as the missile hit an open area, according to the IDF. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列国防军（IDF）表示，真主党昨晚从黎巴嫩向海法湾南部地区发射了一枚弹道导弹。据以色列国防军称，由于导弹击中了开阔地带，所有城镇均未拉响警报。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The demolition of the Lebanese village of Meiss El Jabal on the Israeli border near the kibbutz of Menara in northern Israel is under way by the IDF. An Israeli flag has been raised on the village hills, not far from Menara. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军正在拆除位于以色列北部梅纳拉基布兹附近、以色列边境上的黎巴嫩村庄梅斯埃尔贾巴尔（Meiss El Jabal）。一面以色列国旗已在距离梅纳拉不远的村庄山丘上升起。 @wfwitness

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Zelensky requests support for the launch of the "Tribunal for Russia's Aggression against Ukraine," to hold "Russian war criminals" legally accountable: "This is necessary, just as it was necessary after the Second World War." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044714933875625997/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 泽连斯基请求支持启动“俄罗斯侵略乌克兰法庭”，以追究“俄罗斯战争罪犯”的法律责任：“这很有必要，就像二战后有必要这样做一样。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044714933875625997/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF eliminated a Hamas communications unit commander in Gaza City and two production unit operatives in separate strikes this week. Ahmed Abu Khachira was killed for advancing terror operations against IDF forces. Islam Kenita and Mahmoud Hamduna were killed for restoring Hamas military capabilities during the ceasefire. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 本周，以色列国防军在加沙城的不同空袭中消灭了一名哈马斯通信部队指挥官和两名生产部队人员。艾哈迈德·阿布·哈奇拉（Ahmed Abu Khachira）因推进针对以色列国防军的恐怖行动而被击毙。伊斯兰·凯尼塔（Islam Kenita）和马哈茂德·哈姆杜纳（Mahmoud Hamduna）因在停火期间恢复哈马斯军事能力而被击毙。推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING 🔴 🔴 USNAVCENT expands the Iran blockade worldwide. Iranian vessels, OFAC sanctioned ships, and suspected contraband carriers can now be boarded and seized by U.S. forces anywhere, with the move targeting Iran’s shadow fleet of more than 570 tankers. Key points • Blockade in force since April 13 now applies worldwide under belligerent rights • Neutral flagged vessels tied to Iran or sanctions also at risk • $400M + per day in Iranian oil revenue at risk • Nearly 90% of Iran’s trade is sea based • Rising risk of economic collapse and currency crisis Source: USNAVCENT / NCAGS advisory via Seatrade Maritime (Marcus Hand), April 16, 2026; m tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 突发 🔴 🔴 美国海军中央司令部（USNAVCENT）将伊朗封锁范围扩大至全球。美国军队现在可以在任何地方登船并扣押伊朗船只、受美国外国资产控制办公室（OFAC）制裁的船只以及涉嫌运载违禁品的船只，此举旨在针对伊朗由570多艘油轮组成的“影子船队”。要点 • 自4月13日起生效的封锁现根据交战权适用于全球 • 与伊朗有关或受制裁的悬挂中立国旗帜的船只也面临风险 • 每天超过4亿美元的伊朗石油收入面临风险 • 伊朗近90%的贸易依赖海运 • 经济崩溃和货币危机的风险上升 来源：美国海军中央司令部 / NCAGS 咨询，通过 Seatrade Maritime (Marcus Hand)，2026年4月16日；m 推文

text: Open Source Intel An official Lebanese source told Nidaa Al-Watan that any ceasefire will be conditional and the result of negotiations in Washington. U.S. preparations continue for another meeting between Lebanon and Israel, which could take place in Washington. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 一位黎巴嫩官方消息人士告诉《Nidaa Al-Watan》，任何停火都将是有条件的，并且是华盛顿谈判的结果。美国正在为黎巴嫩和以色列之间的另一次会议做准备，会议可能在华盛顿举行。推文

text: Open Source Intel Reports say the USS Gerald R. Ford has reached 295 days at sea, marking the longest U.S. carrier deployment since the Cold War after a mission spanning the Caribbean, Red Sea and eastern Mediterranean. Originally deployed from Naval Station Norfolk in June 2025, the carrier was reportedly extended multiple times, supported operations tied to Venezuela and Iran, and underwent repairs in Greece after an onboard fire. The ship is now said to be closing in on the longest carrier deployment since 1964. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel） 报道称，杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰（USS Gerald R. Ford）在海上航行时间已达295天，这是自冷战以来美国航母部署时间最长的一次，任务跨越加勒比海、红海和东地中海。据报道，该航母最初于2025年6月从诺福克海军基地部署，后多次延长部署时间，支持了与委内瑞拉和伊朗相关的行动，并在发生火灾后在希腊进行了维修。据称，该舰目前正接近自1964年以来最长的航母部署记录。推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Zelensky receives the International Four Freedoms Award, named after U.S. President Roosevelt's 1941 speech outlining four fundamental human rights, presented by Dutch PM Rob Jetten, at a ceremony in Middelburg, Netherlands. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044710932748587458/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 泽连斯基在荷兰米德尔堡举行的仪式上，从荷兰首相罗布·杰滕（Rob Jetten）手中接过“国际四项自由奖”。该奖项以美国总统罗斯福1941年概述四项基本人权的演讲命名。 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2044710932748587458/video/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🛢️ Russia’s oil refining output dropped by 16% to 4.72 million barrels per day between April 2 and 8, following Ukrainian drone strikes on refining infrastructure, according to Bloomberg. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2044710156785635485/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🛢️ 据彭博社报道，继乌克兰对炼油基础设施发动无人机袭击后，4月2日至8日期间，俄罗斯炼油产量下降了16%，至每天472万桶。与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2044710156785635485/photo/1 推文

See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2044708442930139353/photo/1 tweet

text: Pakistan’s Army Chief, Asim Munir, met with Iran’s Parliament Speaker, Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf.
text_zh: 巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔（Asim Munir）会见了伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）。

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇸🇾 💲 The Syrian dollar has to hit a 13,700 L.S per dollar exchange rate. The average Syrian to Dollar exchange rate during the rule of the former Syrian Government under sanctions was 14,000 L.S @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇸🇾 💲 叙利亚镑兑美元汇率已达到13,700叙利亚镑兑1美元。在前叙利亚政府受制裁统治期间，叙利亚镑兑美元的平均汇率为14,000叙利亚镑。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Heavy Israeli airstrikes targeted the industrial zone in Nabatieh city, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列猛烈的空袭目标是黎巴嫩南部纳巴泰市（Nabatieh）的工业区。 @wfwitness

text: Zelensky and the people of Ukraine have been awarded the “Four Freedoms Award” in the Netherlands.
text_zh: 泽连斯基和乌克兰人民在荷兰被授予“四项自由奖”。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇱🇧 Al-Jadeed: The U.S. along with the UN Special Coordinator for Lebanon Jeanine Hennis-Plasschaert, are working to mediate between Lebanon and Israel in an effort to establish contact between Lebanese President Joseph Aoun and Prime Minister Benjamin…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kan: A race is under way between the Iranians and the Americans over who will claim credit for a ceasefire in Lebanon. Iranian parliamentary speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf spoke by phone with his Lebanese counterpart, Nabih Berri, a Shia ally of Hezbollah. Berri’s office said both stressed that any ceasefire agreement must also include Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇱🇧 Al-Jadeed：美国与联合国黎巴嫩问题特别协调员珍妮·亨尼斯-普拉斯哈特（Jeanine Hennis-Plasschaert）正在黎巴嫩和以色列之间进行调解，试图在黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）和总理本雅明之间建立联系……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kan：伊朗人和美国人之间正在进行一场竞赛，看谁能为黎巴嫩的停火争取功劳。伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫与他的黎巴嫩同行、真主党的什叶派盟友纳比·贝里（Nabih Berri）通了电话。贝里的办公室表示，双方都强调任何停火协议必须包括黎巴嫩。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel 89 Iranian air raid warnings at Muwaffaq Salti Air Base in Jordan as of March 15th. USAF personnel are keeping count on the bunker walls. @Osinttechnical https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044707449953755250/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 截至3月15日，约旦穆瓦法克·萨尔蒂空军基地（Muwaffaq Salti Air Base）共发出89次伊朗空袭警报。美国空军人员正在掩体墙上进行记录。 @Osinttechnical https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044707449953755250/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Morning in Kyiv - a downed missile lies in the courtyard of a high-rise building. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044706609289482352/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 基辅的清晨——一枚被击落的导弹躺在一栋高层建筑的庭院里。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044706609289482352/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A video from the West Bank captures a brief exchange: Interviewer: “Come here, tell me, what is your name?” Girl: “Huriya (Freedom).” Interviewer: “What a beautiful name!” Girl: “I am a smuggled sperm from the occupation’s prisons. My father was imprisoned for 18 years, and now he is a martyr.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一段来自西岸的视频记录了一段简短的对话：采访者：“过来，告诉我，你叫什么名字？”女孩：“胡里亚（Huriya，意为‘自由’）。”采访者：“多好听的名字啊！”女孩：“我是从占领者的监狱里走私出来的精子（所生）。我的父亲被监禁了18年，现在他是一位烈士。” 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ While global attention is focused on a potential ceasefire with Lebanon and a halt to IDF ground operations, the Israeli Defense Forces have called on residents south of the Zahrani River to evacuate immediately, as military activity in the area is entering an intensified phase. 🚀 Airstrikes are ongoing against Hezbollah positions, and civilians have been urged to move north of the Zahrani River without delay. 📢 The warning states: 🔶 “Proximity to Hezbollah infrastructure puts your lives in direct danger.” 🔸 “Movement toward the south may be life-threatening. Leave the area immediately to avoid being in an active combat zone.” 🟠 It appears Israel may be expanding its objectives, aiming not only to suppress Hezbollah positions along the Litani River but also to establish a broader buffer zone further north, around the Zahrani River. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ 当全球注意力集中在与黎巴嫩潜在的停火协议以及以色列国防军（IDF）地面行动的停止上时，以色列国防军已呼吁扎赫拉尼河（Zahrani River）以南的居民立即撤离，因为该地区的军事活动正进入加剧阶段。 🚀 针对真主党阵地的空袭仍在继续，平民已被敦促立即向扎赫拉尼河以北转移。 📢 警告称： 🔶 “靠近真主党基础设施会使您的生命处于直接危险之中。” 🔸 “向南移动可能会危及生命。请立即离开该地区，以免身处活跃的战斗区域。” 🟠 以色列似乎可能正在扩大其目标，不仅旨在压制利塔尼河（Litani River）沿线的真主党阵地，还旨在在更北部的扎赫拉尼河周围建立一个更广泛的缓冲区。与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF: 70 Hezbollah sites hit in Bint Jbeil, southern Lebanon. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军：黎巴嫩南部宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）的70个真主党据点遭到打击。 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF orders immediate evacuation of all areas south of the Zahrani River in Lebanon, including Tyre. Residents told to move north. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044703086631956848/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军下令黎巴嫩扎赫拉尼河以南的所有地区（包括提尔市）立即撤离。居民被告知向北转移。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044703086631956848/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Ukrainian drones struck Russia's Tuapse oil refinery overnight. The facility is ablaze with a smoke plume over 100 km long visible at sunrise. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044702650055213337/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 乌克兰无人机连夜袭击了俄罗斯的图阿普谢（Tuapse）炼油厂。该设施燃起大火，日出时可见长达100多公里的烟柱。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044702650055213337/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF: Egoz Unit destroyed roughly 70 Hezbollah infrastructure sites in Bint Jbeil within one minute. Maglan Unit killed a large number of operatives in the same area. Forces found RPGs, Kalashnikovs, anti-aircraft missiles, and surveillance gear staged inside a civilian zone. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044702077134246001/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军：埃戈兹部队（Egoz Unit）在一分钟内摧毁了宾特朱拜勒约70个真主党基础设施据点。马格兰部队（Maglan Unit）在同一地区击毙了大量武装人员。部队在平民区内发现了存放的RPG、卡拉什尼科夫冲锋枪、防空导弹和监视设备。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044702077134246001/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Aluminium prices have hit a four-year high as Middle East deliveries continue to be disrupted. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 由于中东地区的交付持续受到干扰，铝价已创下四年来的新高。 推文

text: WarTranslated Explosions were also reported in the Russian city of Belgorod. A column of smoke is rising over the city. Reports indicate that the "Yuzhnaya" electrical substation caught fire, leaving part of the city without power. https://t.co/pl4VONfNUw tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 据报道，俄罗斯别尔哥罗德市也发生了爆炸。一股浓烟正在城市上空升起。报告显示，“尤日纳亚”（Yuzhnaya）变电站起火，导致该市部分地区断电。 https://t.co/pl4VONfNUw 推文

text: Open Source Intel IRGC’S REZAEI: “We will sink all U.S ships” Mohsen Rezaei, adviser to Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei and former IRGC commander: ◆ “We will not concede on our 10 conditions under naval pressure.” ◆ “I oppose continuing the ceasefire.” ◆ “We will sink all ships and let none escape,” warning U.S. vessels against approaching the Strait of Hormuz. ◆ “President Trump wants to police Hormuz,” adding the U.S. “can no longer sustain the war and fears escalation.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）的雷扎伊（Rezaei）：“我们将击沉所有美国船只”。最高领袖哈梅内伊的顾问、前伊斯兰革命卫队指挥官穆赫辛·雷扎伊（Mohsen Rezaei）表示：◆ “我们不会在海军压力下对我们的10项条件做出让步。” ◆ “我反对继续停火。” ◆ “我们将击沉所有船只，不让任何一艘逃脱，”警告美国船只不要靠近霍尔木兹海峡。 ◆ “特朗普总统想要监管霍尔木兹，”并补充说美国“已无法维持战争，且害怕局势升级。” 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 IDF struck the Qasmiyeh Bridge once again. This comes after the withdrawal of the Lebanese army from the area after Israel reportedly warned them that the bridge would be targeted. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军再次袭击了卡斯米耶大桥（Qasmiyeh Bridge）。此前，黎巴嫩军队在收到以色列关于该桥将被作为目标的警告后，已从该地区撤出。@wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 🇮🇱 ⚡️ Hungary’s newly elected PM, Péter Magyar, held a “warm introductory phone call” with War Criminal Netanyahu He invited this war criminal Netanyahu to attend the 70th anniversary of the Hungarian Uprising of 1956 in Budapest in October 2026 and reaffirmed strong bilateral ties. Netanyahu accepted and, in turn, invited Magyar to a “government” meeting in Jerusalem.
text_zh: 🇭🇺 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 匈牙利新当选总理彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）与战犯内塔尼亚胡进行了“热情的介绍性通话”。他邀请这位战犯内塔尼亚胡参加2026年10月在布达佩斯举行的匈牙利1956年革命70周年纪念活动，并重申了双方牢固的双边关系。内塔尼亚胡接受了邀请，并反过来邀请马扎尔前往耶路撒冷参加“政府”会议。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 Al-Jadeed: The U.S. along with the UN Special Coordinator for Lebanon Jeanine Hennis-Plasschaert, are working to mediate between Lebanon and Israel in an effort to establish contact between Lebanese President Joseph Aoun and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. The proposed framework includes a trilateral conversation between P.M Netanyahu and President Aoun, with the participation and sponsorship of U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio, similar to his role in the ongoing talks in Washington. If agreed upon, the trilateral contact would focus on a potential ceasefire and the initiation of steps by both sides aimed at reaching a broader agreement between Lebanon and Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 Al-Jadeed电视台：美国与联合国黎巴嫩问题特别协调员珍妮·亨尼斯-普拉斯哈特（Jeanine Hennis-Plasschaert）正在黎巴嫩和以色列之间进行斡旋，试图建立黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）与总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡之间的联系。拟议的框架包括内塔尼亚胡总理与奥恩总统进行三方对话，并由美国国务卿马尔科·卢比奥（Marco Rubio）参与和赞助，类似于他在华盛顿正在进行的会谈中所扮演的角色。如果达成一致，三方接触将重点讨论潜在的停火协议，并由双方启动旨在达成黎巴嫩与以色列之间更广泛协议的步骤。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Didn't Stephen Miller want to say "final solution" but then realized it would be bad? 🔴 @DDDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Tasnim: Iran will shift its entire education system to online learning starting April 21. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 Tasnim：伊朗将从4月21日起将其整个教育系统转向在线学习。推文

text: Open Source Intel IRAN: Hezbollah in Lebanon first. We will break down any negotiations and completely destroy our country for Hezbollah terrorists in Lebanon. ALSO IRAN IN THE SAME STATEMENT: America, stop your Israel first policy. can’t make this up. Iranian Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf has demands for President Trump: “The completion and consolidation of a comprehensive ceasefire in Lebanon will be the result of the steadfastness and struggle of the esteemed Hezbollah and its heroism, as well as the unity of the Axis of Resistance. The United States must commit to the agreement. The resistance and Iran are one and the same entity, whether in war or in a ceasefire. America must back away from Israel's first mistake.” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗：黎巴嫩真主党优先。我们将打破任何谈判，并为了黎巴嫩的真主党恐怖分子彻底摧毁我们的国家。伊朗在同一声明中还表示：美国，停止你们的以色列优先政策。简直无法编造。伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫（Ghalibaf）对特朗普总统提出了要求：“在黎巴嫩达成并巩固全面停火，将是受人尊敬的真主党及其英雄主义，以及抵抗之弧团结一致的坚定和斗争的结果。美国必须遵守该协议。无论是在战争还是停火期间，抵抗力量和伊朗都是同一个实体。美国必须从以色列优先的错误中退缩。” - 开源情报推文

text: WarTranslated Overnight, Ukrainian drones struck Russia's Krasnodar Krai. A fire has been reported at the Tuapse oil refinery. Preliminary reports indicate that at least two oil storage tanks caught fire at the Rosneft refinery. The blaze has yet to be contained. Debris also fell on the grounds of enterprises located near the seaport. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 昨晚，乌克兰无人机袭击了俄罗斯克拉斯诺达尔边疆区。据报道，图阿普谢（Tuapse）炼油厂发生火灾。初步报告显示，俄罗斯石油公司（Rosneft）炼油厂至少有两个储油罐起火。大火尚未得到控制。碎片还落在了海港附近的企业所在地。推文

text: Open Source Intel Brazilian President Lula: "Donald Trump has no right to wake up in the morning and threaten a country." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044696584089137241/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 巴西总统卢拉：“唐纳德·特朗普没有权利在早上醒来后威胁一个国家。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044696584089137241/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Senior Iranian official to Reuters: Greater hopes for extending the ceasefire and a second round of talks after Pakistan's army commander visited Tehran. Munir heads to the U.S. tomorrow as part of mediation efforts between Washington and Tehran, per Al Jazeera. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗高级官员对路透社表示：在巴基斯坦陆军司令访问德黑兰后，延长停火和进行第二轮谈判的希望增加。据半岛电视台报道，穆尼尔（Munir）将于明天前往美国，作为华盛顿和德黑兰之间调解努力的一部分。推文

text: Open Source Intel An Israeli Navy missile boat shot down a Hezbollah drone launched from Lebanon overnight, the IDF says. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044695419720986651/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防军称，一艘以色列海军导弹艇昨晚击落了一架从黎巴嫩发射的真主党无人机。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044695419720986651/video/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Ukrainian attack drones successfully hit Russia’s Tuapse oil refinery overnight, setting the facility ablaze. The rising sun revealed a smoke plume emerging from the burning refinery already well over 100 km long. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044694638125019619/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 乌克兰攻击无人机昨晚成功击中了俄罗斯的图阿普谢炼油厂，使该设施陷入火海。初升的太阳显示，从燃烧的炼油厂冒出的烟柱已经超过100公里长。https://twitter.com/OSINTtechnical/status/2044694638125019619/photo/1 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @CENTCOM : Yesterday, an Iranian-flagged cargo vessel tried to evade the U.S. blockade after leaving Bandar Abbas, exiting the Strait of Hormuz, and transiting along the Iranian coastline. The guided-missile destroyer USS Spruance (DDG 111) successfully redirected the vessel, which is heading back to Iran. Ten vessels have now been turned around and ZERO ships have broken through since the start of the U.S. blockade on Monday. tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @CENTCOM ：昨天，一艘悬挂伊朗国旗的货船在离开阿巴斯港、驶出霍尔木兹海峡并沿伊朗海岸线航行时，试图逃避美国的海上封锁。斯普鲁恩斯号（USS Spruance, DDG 111）导弹驱逐舰成功将其拦截并调头，该船目前正返回伊朗。自周一美国开始封锁以来，已有十艘船只被拦截调头，零艘船只成功突破封锁。推文
